title: Connecting a workdoc to another workdoc?
excerpt: I create a new work doc in a project. Now I would like to refer/connect/link to another work doc in the same project. I know I can copy/paste the url, but is there another way to connect?

posts.author: Rio (Rio)
posts.cookedHtml: I create a new work doc in a project. Now I would like to refer/connect/link to another work doc in the same project. I know I can copy/paste the url, but is there another way to connect?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rio! At the moment, the best way to link two workdocs is with the URL like you mentioned.

However, if you have either of these docs in a Files Column in a board, you could embed a Table Widget here and you’ll be able to see the workdoc in the Files Column of the widget.

What do you think? Is this an okay workaround or would you prefer using the URL?

posts.author: Rio (Rio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Charlotte - yes, having a board with a File column definitely helps as an additional alternative.

Why I asked this was when I created the written doc, I expected to be able to connect (create a link) to another doc like you can in a Wiki. It just seemed something that would make creating cross-references a lot quicker in a written doc…

I was actually expecting the ‘@’ sign to show me not only people but also other documents and/or boards. So while you are writing a doc it’s a very “natural” way to connect to other people or documents in the system.

posts.author: RemiDM (Remi Delaporte-Mathurin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Agreed, a wiki-type document would greatly help!

posts.author: adam.karnet (Adam Karnet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, just wanted to ask - it would be super helpful for building for example documentation section, if you could easily create links between individual workdocs.
Is that functionality hanging in the backlog currently, or is it not even considered?

posts.author: NattJoy (Natt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hiya, not sure if this has been solved for.
But I checked the video that was posted below and it helped me find a solution…

If you click on the blue plus symbol on an empty line, you will get this pop up:

If you select more options a panel on the right hand side of the screen will appear with a “mention docs” option:

image424×884 31.4 KB

This is what it looks like in use - so its not perfect, but still better and links through to the connecting document.

image692×115 18 KB

Hope this is helpful to others
